scripts.dev: npm run dev:starter-kit & npm run dev:reference-app
scripts.dev:mock: npm run dev:mock:starter-kit & npm run dev:mock:reference-app
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-config && npm run build -w packages/api-v3-client && npm run build -w packages/domain-core && npm run build -w packages/ui-system
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/starter-kit && npm run build -w apps/reference-app
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:apps
scripts.clean: npx -y rimraf node_modules packages/*/dist packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/node_modules
